description: Configure a 'Kiosk Mode' survey for trade show lead capture titled 'TechInnovate 2026 Lead Capture'. The survey must include an 'Attendee Details' group containing three questions: 'Name' (Text), 'Email' (Text), and a hidden 'CaptureTime' (Equation type using {date("Y-m-d H:i:s")}). Adjust the survey settings to disable IP address saving, cookies for repeated participation, and the 'save and resume' option. Enable automatic URL loading upon completion, setting the End URL to the survey's own public link to ensure the survey loops immediately for the next participant. Activate the survey.
